pi_items.source: setup_task.sh explicitly inserts this contract name.
Task description explicit instructions and export_result.sh database queries.
setup_task.sh creates this account, and task instructions explicitly require retaining it.
Task description specifies the new status.
Task description requires 18900.00, which is exactly a 5% increase over the setup 18000.00 value.
setup_task.sh explicitly inserts 18000.00 as the total_contract_value for the old contract.

privileged_info_summary: The task data is synthetically generated via SQL injection in setup_task.sh. The original contract 'Vanguard Data Systems - Enterprise SLA 2024' is seeded with a total value of 18000.00 and linked to the account 'Vanguard Data Systems'. The instructions explicitly require the agent to duplicate this into a new contract named 'Vanguard Data Systems - Enterprise SLA 2025' with a status of 'In Progress', start date 2025-01-01, end date 2025-12-31, signed date 2024-12-15, and a total value of 18900.00 (which correctly represents the requested 5% increase). All metadata parameters exactly align with these explicit setup parameters and instructions.
